query:
UPDATE gambling_mine SET
                miners = $2,
                mines = $3,
                land = $4,
                countries = $5,
                continents = $6,
                planets = $7,
                solar_systems = $8,
                galaxies = $9,
                universes = $10,
                prestige = $11,
                coal = $12,
                iron = $13,
                gold = $14,
                redstone = $15,
                lapis = $16,
                diamonds = $17,
                emeralds = $18,
                tech = $19,
                utility = $20,
                production = $21
            WHERE user_id = $1 AND prestige = $22;
